title: Panda Ignore
description: A simple drop-in solution to allow players to ignore other players. This exists because the vanilla mute won't work on NoChatReports servers.
body:
# PandaIgnore

## Description

A simple drop-in ignore. This will allow players to use /ignore /ignorelist to add/remove players and view their ignore list. 

## Try it out
`hardcoreanarchy.gay`   (Deathban Anarchy)  
`sky.hardcoreanarchy.gay`   (Skyblock Anarchy)

## Support

[Support discord here!]( https://discord.gg/3tP3Tqu983)
